Angry: Modify the subject's expression to look slightly angry. Keep mouth closed
Disgusted: Edit the subject's face to show slight disgust. Keep mouth closed
Fearful: Change the expression to show slight fear. Keep mouth closed
Happy: Adjust the expression to be slightly happy. Keep mouth closed
Neutral: Adjust the expression to be neutral.
Sad: Modify the face to slightly express sadness. Do not add tears
Surprised: Edit the subject to look slightly surprised. Keep mouth closed
